'''Nan Latourain''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Nan Latourain was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] before passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Delving into the work of the [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Sentinel]], Latourain became an expert [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] and attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] at some point in time.<ref name="TFP" />

Latourain was stationed at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], having been offered a position as an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]]. Accepting, Latourain taught classes in codes, ciphers, and encryption bypasses at the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]] to [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|older initiates]]. Famed Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] studied under Latourain during his time at the academy.<ref name="TFP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' {{1stm}}
